# Processes & Deployment

## Runtime Model
- **Type:** Standalone CLI tool
- **Invocation:** `spectral <command>` or `python -m spectral`
- **Process lifetime:** Ephemeral — runs until Ctrl+C or duration expires
- **Concurrency:** Single audio callback thread managed by `sounddevice`

## Build Commands
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `pip install -e ".[dev]"` | Editable install with dev extras |
| `python3 -m pip install -e .` | Build and install |
| `hatchling build` | Package build (via pyproject.toml) |

## No Deployment Targets [?]
- No Docker, no cloud deployment, no CI/CD pipelines currently defined
- Single-user local execution model

## No Service Topology
- No microservices, no background workers, no daemons
- All audio processing is in-process

## Environment Variables
- `sounddevice` reads PortAudio configuration from system [?]
- No custom environment variables used [?]

## Install Mechanism
- Python package published to PyPI (planned) or installed locally
- User installs via `pip install -e .` for development
